name: Steamed Rice B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice.
2. Add water so that it covers the rice by 1-1/2 inches.
3. Cover tightly and cook on high flame until all the water has disappeared from the top of the rice.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 20 to 30 minutes, or until the rice is tender and dry.
5. Rice that adheres to the bottom of the pan can be fried and used as a garnish for soup.
Temperature: HOT
Effort: AVERAGE
Time: 00:40
